export const translations = {
    en: {
        appTitle: "AI-Powered Crop Yield Prediction",
        appSubtitle: "Smart Farming Solutions for Farmers",
        tabDashboard: "📊 Dashboard",

        tabResults: "📋 Results",

        formCropType: "फसल का प्रकार",
        formRegion: "क्षेत्र",
        formTemp: "तापमान (°C)",
        formRain: "वर्षा (mm)",
        formHumidity: "नमी (%)",
        formPh: "मिट्टी का पीएच (pH)",
        formN: "नाइट्रोजन (kg/ha)",

        formN: "ଯବକ୍ଷାରଯାନ (kg/ha)",
        formP: "ଫସଫରସ୍ (kg/ha)",
        formK: "ପୋଟାସିୟମ୍ (kg/ha)",
        formPesticide: "କୀଟନାଶକ ବ୍ୟବହାର (kg/ha)",
        formIrrigation: "ଜଳସେଚନ ଘଣ୍ଟା/ଦିନ",
        formAutoFill: "ପାଣିପାଗ ସ୍ୱୟଂଚାଳିତ ଭରଣ",
